productName: Animal Tsunami ( I/H ) - Plaid Jacket BHO Cured Resin Cart 1g
description: A hybrid vape cartridge filled with Animal Tsunami oil — smooth, flavorful vapor in a discreet, no-torch, push-button format that goes wherever you go. Flavor on the go, with notes of diesel, tropical, and sweet, leading into an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
